steps.title: Solve for x from the given equation
steps.content:
Starting with $7 + x = 5$, subtract 7 from both sides:
$$x = 5 - 7 = -2$$

steps.title: Substitute and evaluate the expression
steps.content:
Now substitute $x = -2$ into $-14 - 2x$:
$$-14 - 2(-2) = -14 + 4 = -10$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
